Value: lobster, nightshade, capsaicin, dairy, finfish, allium (Garlic, onion), citrus, mushrooms,
Sear Snapper on plancha skin-side-down, with a touch of oil on plancha first
Once skin side is crisped and the albumin (white juice in fish) begins to show on side, remove
transfer to sizzle plate, skin side up, and finish cooking in oven
Lobster Mash should be hot-held in a steam bath.  Ensure it is thick but not dry before serving
On the medium white round plate, draw a curved line just off-center with the truffle puree
Plate the lobster mash in the center of the plate and truffle puree line
Plate snapper on top of lobster mash
Starting on a corner of the fish, and spiraling to the outter third of the plate, sauce with LBB
Garnish with micros on top of fish
